prose:
**Aniline Fukui functions and dual descriptor** — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`), PySCF engine, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (anion/cation doublets).  Geometry: fixed input structure supplied as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`; no re-optimization was performed (single-point charges on this geometry for N, N + 1, and N – 1 states → “B3LYP/def2-TZVP//input.xyz”).  Density fitting was **not** used (exact four-center integrals).  SCF cycles for the neutral, cation, and anion all converged; overall integrity.status = “ok” and trustworthy = true.
